commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow parser/protocol repair is automatable, while maintainers still need to approve the broader security/config direction.; Needs attention: The exec policy design is opt-in and hardened, but the parser currently drops valid policy findings without file locations, which weakens install-policy audit diagnostics.; Review finding: [P2] Preserve location-less policy findings — src/security/install-policy.ts:6... (sha=636df95ef2143fe21903630c5c11084ec54fccba)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in `security.installPolicy` exec gate across skill and plugin install/update paths, deprecates the gateway skill unsafe override, adds doctor/docs/schema coverage, and extends install tests.

PR surface: Source +1838, Tests +1672, Docs +195, Other +13. Total +3718 across 54 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows a policy finding without `file` is filtered out by `normalizeFinding`. I did not execute the PR branch because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow parser/protocol repair is automatable, while maintainers still need to approve the broader security/config direction.
